description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on the left side, allowing for abundant natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The house includes a spacious garage with a double door, visible on the right, and multiple rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern across the facade. The main entryway is set back beneath a covered area, flanked by glass panels and a prominent overhang. The structure is primarily finished in white with black window frames, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The layout suggests open-plan living spaces and a focus on functionality and minimalism.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a spacious garage. The design is sleek and geometric, with white walls and black window frames.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main facade, large glass windows, and the garage on the right.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the expansive glass wall and the rear section of the house.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back windows and the side of the garage.
description_view_3: Direct front view with a clear look at the garage doors, main entryway, and upper-level windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a covered overhang, glass panels, and a minimalistic door
